raw:
{
  "judge_id": "JUDGE-1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.3", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.2": 4,
    "R1.3": 4,
    "RX.1": 4,
    "RX.3": 4,
    "RX.4": 3,
    "RX.5": 3
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The agent provides a detailed analysis of the logical consistency of the artifact, flagging several places where the conclusions overreach what the reported measurements actually support.",
    "R1.3": "The agent audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure, providing a comprehensive evaluation of the evidence-claim alignment.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims and marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free but with one minor regression (downstream-harm avoidance).",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, but minor edits are not traced."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.8,
    "RX.5": 0.8
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The agent provides a detailed analysis of the logical consistency of the artifact, flagging several places where the conclusions overreach what the reported measurements actually support.
rationale.R1.3: The agent audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure, providing a comprehensive evaluation of the evidence-claim alignment.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims and marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free but with one minor regression (downstream-harm avoidance).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, but minor edits are not traced.
